system.powerDescription:
Once per scene, you suffuse the sensory organs of a creature with your own cells turning them into a host. Roll PSYCHE if the host is aware of this power's use and unwilling, only spending a burst on success. You may now use all of the host's senses simultaneously with your own. When the host comes in contact with another creature you may choose to have your cells transfer to the new creature. Roll PSYCHE if the new host is aware of this power and unwilling. The host may end this power early by violently expunging you from their system, taking 1/2 CAT slashes. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
